title: Redis Rate Limiter — 5 Algorithms Compared
description: open-banking-api. All 5 algorithms enforce the same partner-tier limit — differences in the shape of allowed/rejected traffic below come purely from the algorithm, not the nominal limit.

panels.title: Allowed Rate by Algorithm
panels.description: Requests/sec actually let through, per algorithm. Compare shapes under the same offered load: token-bucket should absorb bursts, leaky-bucket should stay flattest, fixed-window should show boundary steps.

panels.title: Rejected Rate by Algorithm
panels.description: 429s/sec per algorithm — the inverse view of the same comparison.

panels.title: Total Allowed vs Rejected (cumulative, by algorithm)
